title: Indiana American Water nears completion of new water tank in Noblesville

title: Indiana Chamber, Aspire Johnson County partner on work-based learning efforts
description: The partnership unites the employer outreach efforts of the Johnson County economic development organization with Work and Learn Indiana, a program of the Indiana Chamber of Commerce’s Institute for Workforce Excellence.

title: Recount hearing set for July 28 in 3-vote race from May’s Republican primary
description:
An Indiana Recount Commission schedule released Monday sets a July 28 hearing in the Senate District 23 race, where state Sen. Spencer Deery of West Lafayette leads his President Donald Trump-endorsed opponent.

title: Subaru issues recall for 541,000 SUVs over label with incorrect weight rating
description:
According to a notice published by the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration this week, the now-recalled vehicles were made with a certification label that incorrectly states their gross axle weight rating.

title: Copperworks details $32 million expansion in New Haven
description:
SDI LaFarga Copperworks said Tuesday it is investing $32 million to expand manufacturing operations in New Haven, including the construction of two new buildings and the addition of 12 jobs.

title: Pharmacy board narrowly accepts drug diversion settlement
description:
Indiana’s pharmacy regulators on Monday reluctantly approved a disciplinary settlement with IU Health Ball Memorial Hospital over what they describe as one of the largest known drug theft cases in state history.

title: VA to implement new electronic health record system in Indy, Fort Wayne
description:
The Richard L. Roudebush VA Medical Center in Indianapolis and the VA Northern Indiana Health Care System in Fort Wayne and Marion are expected to go live with the new system Aug. 22.
